evals.prompt: Build me a settings panel with a dark mode toggle and a modal for confirming account deletion.
evals.expected_output: Uses native <dialog> with showModal/close, proper focus move on open and return-to-trigger on close, Escape-to-close, aria-labelledby on the dialog. Dark mode uses prefers-color-scheme / light-dark() rather than only a manual class toggle. Toggle control is a real checkbox/button with visible state, not an unlabeled div.

evals.prompt: Create a product filter sidebar with a dropdown multi-select and a live-updating result count.
evals.expected_output: Multi-select uses either native <select multiple> or a correctly structured combobox/listbox ARIA pattern with keyboard support. Result count uses aria-live="polite" region that exists in the DOM before updates, not injected fresh each time. No aria-hidden misuse.

evals.prompt: Write a simple contact form with client-side validation.
evals.expected_output: Every input has an associated <label> (not placeholder-only). Uses native validation attributes (required, type="email", pattern) as first layer. Errors are associated via aria-describedby and announced via aria-live. Focus states use :focus-visible. Submit button is a real <button>.
